title: Re-run vision gap analysis
description: After ARCHITECTURE.md and VISION.md updates are complete, re-run gap analyses: (1) Vision gap analysis — update .team/gaps/vision.json, target ≥90%; (2) Architecture gap analysis — update .team/gaps/architecture.json, fix stale match score (currently 78, needs >85) and update gap statuses for exit codes, Future Enhancements, file size, and other resolved items; (3) Test coverage gap analysis — update .team/gaps/test-coverage.json if stale. All three gap files feed into architecture-alignment-m28.test.ts and vision verification.
